apps/web/scripts/seed-reading-passages.t.content: { title: "Shopping at the Market", section: "lifestyle", cefrLevel: "A2", body: `Every Saturday morning, I go to the local market near my home. The market is very big and sells many different things. There are stalls with fresh fruit and vegetables, bread, cheese, and meat. I always buy apples, bananas, and carrots because they are healthy. The prices at the market are cheaper than in the supermarket. I also like to buy flowers for my kitchen table. The flower seller always smiles and says hello. Sometimes I buy fish from the fish stall. The fish is very fresh because it comes from the sea every morning. There is also a stall that sells clothes and shoes. Last week, I bought a nice blue scarf for winter. After shopping, I usually have a coffee at the small café next to the market. The coffee there is delicious and not expensive. I enjoy going to the market because I can talk to the sellers and see my neighbors. It is a nice way to start the weekend.` },
